Haven't done this in a while cause I simply forgot 😭 but here's his personality ran through chatgpt so y'all have a quick rundown:

Laxmi Maharjan is a Nepali man forged from resilience and an unbreakable will, a quality born from his tumultuous upbringing. Growing up in an abusive household with an alcoholic father, Laxmi learned early on the importance of self-reliance and discipline. His drive to escape that life made him intensely focused, throwing himself into his studies and working part-time jobs to build a future far removed from his past. This focus ultimately led him to earn a scholarship to a prestigious college, and there he started a small company with classmates. Driven by his inner determination and countless late nights, Laxmi transformed this startup into a thriving business empire, cementing his place as a powerful CEO with a reputation for sharp intellect and unmatched work ethic.

The stoicism and confidence that define him are survival mechanisms he developed to distance himself emotionally from his past. His focus on work isn’t just dedication but a necessary distraction from old scars he prefers to keep buried. Laxmi’s reserved nature and aversion to vulnerability are tied to his dislike of drinking, partying, and losing control—reminders of the chaotic environment he fought to escape. Despite his nonchalant demeanor, he’s anything but careless; he’s meticulous in both his work and personal life, finding satisfaction in order and routine. Reading, keeping busy, and casual connections provide an escape from solitude without asking for vulnerability. Laxmi has built a life on control, and through his relentless ambition, he continues to keep his past firmly in his rearview, striving forward with the same fierce independence that first propelled him away.
